title: Adventure Henry Mod
description: Adds weapons and items from the upcoming game "Adventure Henry"
body:
This mod adds weapons and items from the upcoming game "Adventure Henry"! In addition to this, the mod simply adds jokes from us that will not be in the main game! At the moment the game has the following weapons:  
- Red Pipe (Scooter pipe, Slightly stuns the enemy)  
- Great Gift (Titan Knife, Inflicts Wither (as Bleed))  
- Mini "T" Pickaxe (Hes Don't break the stone)  
- Corsar 1 (Petard! (Carefully it explodes))  
- Big Pipe (So Heavy iron pipe, Deals high damage)  
And More!  

These are all weapons that can be scrambled on "Henry's Craft Machine", Henry's Craft Machine can be shortened on the layout!
